en: A SONG OF ASCENTS.When the LORD restored the fortunes of Zion, we were like those who dream.
zh: 耶和華使被擄的人歸回錫安的時候， 我們好像在作夢的人。

en: Then our mouth was filled with laughter, and our tongue with shouts of joy; then they said among the nations, "The LORD has done great things for them."
zh: 那時，我們滿口喜笑， 滿舌歡呼； 那時列國中有人說： “耶和華為他們行了大事。”

en: The LORD has done great things for us; we are glad.
zh: 耶和華為我們行了大事， 我們就歡喜。

en: Restore our fortunes, O LORD, like streams in the Negeb!
zh: 耶和華啊，求你使我們被擄的人歸回， 像南地的河水復流一樣。

en: Those who sow in tears shall reap with shouts of joy!
zh: 那些流淚撒種的， 必歡呼收割。

en: He who goes out weeping, bearing the seed for sowing, shall come home with shouts of joy, bringing his sheaves with him.
zh: 那帶著種子流著淚出去撒種的， 必帶著禾捆歡呼快樂地回來。
